Public Relations and Advertising

Department Chair's Message

MENU

Assoc. Prof. Nezahat Hanzade Uralman

Head of Department

Welcome to the Department of Public Relations and Advertising.

One of education for effective communication for
individuals and institutions to create language, design systems that are
value-adding in society, and fostering trust. In an era in which communication
is no longer just the transfer of information, but a multi-dimensional process
also aimed at increasing social sensitivity and finding ways to contribute
solutions to create a sustainable future by showing an ethical side. Our
understanding, which lies at the heart of our department, enables us to engage
with interdisciplinary learning experiences that apply theoretical knowledge to
real-world scenarios.

At the intersection of creativity, strategic
thinking, and technology lie public relations and advertising in an
increasingly digitalized world. We delve into the essential elements of digital
marketing, brand management, media relations, crisis communication and
storytelling in our curriculum but also tackle some of the emerging trends like
AI supported communication practices, data-driven communication efforts and
digital content production. That’s how our students learn the knowledge and
skills they need to understand not only today’s communication environment”—but
the communication ecosystem of tomorrow.

At our department, communication education is
engaged through an integrated academic and industry approach. Our students are
exposed to real-world professional communication practices while still in the
education continuum, through collaborations with industry professionals,
branded courses, applied workshops and project-based learning experiences.
Further, our department cultivates an international academic environment that
promotes scholarly production through collaborations, research projects,
symposiums and conferences.

In today’s challenging communication landscape,
it has become increasingly important for professionals to embrace trust and
transparency. To gain trust, institutions and brands need to work not just on
effective messaging, but also take an open, honest and responsible approach toward
communication. At the Department of Public Relations and Advertising, we are
trying to instill these values in our students so that ethical responsibility
becomes their professional reflex.

Department of Public Relations and Advertising:
Educating communication professionals who impact effectiveness at the
individual and societal level. Our graduates have pursued careers throughout a
range of sectors, including advertising agencies and media organizations to
non-governmental organizations and international institutions. But to us,
success is defined not only by professional competence but also in ethical
values, awareness of social responsibility and critical thinking skills.

In the Department of Public Relations and
Advertising, you do not only learn a profession, but also become part of a
journey that makes value, encourages change and creates trust in society. We
welcome all students who want to experience the transformative power of
Communication and contribute to the Communication World of the next decade to
join us in our department.
